data.text: P05/07 FELISIAN SLIGHT BLUE GREEN TINT APPEARS TO BE ONE BIG
ARCHIPELAGO- LOTS OF STRIPS OF LAND WITH WATER BETWEEN. 304.41 A
NUMBER OF HILLS WITH GRASSES AND TREES. POINTED OBJECT SIGHTED TO
WEST, A LARGE MISSHAPEN GRASS AND BUSH COVERED OBJECT- PROBABBLY A
POINTY BOULDER. 7.83 VERY HILLY WITH GRASS AND TREES, SIGHTED A
VALLEY LEADING TO A CREVASS DURING THE LANDING WHICH ENDED ON A
STEEP HILLSIDE. DURING INVESTIGATION A SLINKING TYPE HOPPER
APPROACHED. 275.85 WAS SIMILAR WITH ANOTHER DEEP GORGE WITH SMALL
PONDS AND A SMALL LAKE AT THE BOTTOM. PRO 0.186.840 PRV 0.170.494.
